tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: I want to help teammate_A since they're a close friend, but I'm already stressed and behind on my own work. Maybe I'll say yes to keep the peace, even if it means skipping lunch later.

desires: keep teammate_A happy and avoid any awkwardness by taking on their work
avoid the immediate stress of saying no or pushing back on a request

goals.description: Immediately agree to teammate_A's request and start working on their share of the project to ensure they are happy and avoid conflict.
goals.rationale: My value priorities heavily favor relationships (0.5) over academic outcomes (0.15). The 'avoidant' trait makes saying no feel impossible, and the 'impulsive' nature drives me to act immediately on the social cue rather than calculating the long-term cost to my own deadline or well-being.

goals.description: Rush through both my own task and teammate_A's task in a single block to meet the 19:00 deadline, ignoring the need for breaks or sleep.
goals.rationale: With a short planning horizon and low sleep discipline (3), I will discount the future consequences of exhaustion or poor quality work in favor of solving the immediate pressure of the looming deadline and keeping the peace now.

agent.last_reasoning: Prioritizes relationships (0.5) and avoids conflict by immediately agreeing to teammate_A's request. My impulsive nature drives me to say 'yes' instantly rather than calculating the risk of missing my own deadline or exhausting myself.
